title: Gooey Festive Spanish Beef Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free-friendly fermented and gooey festive dish featuring beef cutlets prepared with sous-vide for an extra tender texture.

ingredients.name: Beef Cutlet
ingredients.notes: Marinated with fermented ingredients for depth of flavor
Used as a base for the marinade and sauce
To add a pop of freshness to the dish
Used as a sauce component for added richness and thickness

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 60°C (140°F). Season the beef cutlets with salt and pepper, then marinate them in soy sauce and fermented ingredients overnight.
Once you're ready to cook, remove the beef from the fridge. Preheat a skillet or wok over medium-high heat, add olive oil and let it get hot.
Add the seasoned beef cutlets and sear on both sides until golden brown and cooked through (about 3-4 minutes per side).
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside. In the same pan, sauté minced garlic until fragrant, then add soy sauce and sour cream to create a rich sauce.

Return the seared beef cutlets to the skillet along with any accumulated juices for a more flavorful dish. Toss everything together and let it cook through while stirring occasionally (about 5 minutes).
Garnish with green onions and fresh basil leaves before serving hot.
